name: WhatsApp Selection Notification Sender - De Paseo en Fincas

parameters.query:
with input as (
  select
    {{ "'" + String($json.conversation_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}::text as conversation_id,
    {{ "'" + String($json.selected_finca_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}::text as selected_finca_id,
    {{ "'" + String($json.recipient_phone).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}::text as recipient_phone,
    {{ "'" + String($json.template_name || 'staff_finca_selected_v1').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}::text as template_name,
    {{ "'" + String($json.template_language || 'es_CO').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}::text as template_language,
    {{ "'" + JSON.stringify($json.payload || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}::jsonb as payload
),
inserted as (
  insert into public.selection_notifications (
    conversation_id,
    selected_finca_id,
    recipient_phone,
    template_name,
    template_language,
    status,
    payload
  )
  select
    input.conversation_id,
    input.selected_finca_id,
    input.recipient_phone,
    input.template_name,
    input.template_language,
    'pending',
    input.payload
  from input
  on conflict (conversation_id, selected_finca_id, recipient_phone)
  where status in ('pending', 'sent')
  do nothing
  returning *
)
select * from inserted;

update public.selection_notifications
set
  status = 'sent',
  provider_message_id = {{ $json.provider_message_id ? "'" + String($json.provider_message_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'null' }},
  sent_at = now(),
  error_message = null
where id = {{ Number.isFinite(Number($json.id)) ? Number($json.id) : 'null' }}
returning id, status;

with input as (
  select
    {{ "'" + String($json.conversation_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}::text as conversation_id,
